title: Personal information charter
body: "Great British Energy - Nuclear is committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal information. Our privacy notices set out the standards you can expect from us when we collect, hold or use your personal information.   Privacy Notice Employee, Secondee and Contractor: Privacy Notice   You can contact our Data Protection Officer via:  dataprotection@greatbritishnuclear.uk   Great British Energy - Nuclear10 Victoria StreetVictoriaSW1H 0NNUnited Kingdom   "
